$comment: Single source of truth for all test-suite time budgets (milliseconds). Layers: testTimeoutMs/hookTimeoutMs = per-test & per-hook (Layer 1+2); fileBudgetMs = per test file wall-clock (Layer 3); runBudgetMs = whole runner invocation (Layer 4); aggregate.totalBudgetMs = the entire test-all sequence (Layer 5). Optional rssWarnMb: per-file RSS high-water-mark soft-warn threshold (MB) — vitest-guard prints a warning when peak RSS for any single file exceeds this; raise only alongside --max-old-space-size in vitest.config.ts. Edit here, never inline in configs.

aggregate.$comment: Covers the whole heavy run: preflight standard tier minus test:unit (typecheck ~3 min + lint ~2 min + docs/catalog/schema checks ~1 min) + test:unit for all packages (~25-30 min, no per-step budget — covered here) + e2e-palette + test:e2e. Must be sized above the sum of the covered steps' expected durations. Bump here if clean heavy runs start breaching.

tierStandardPlus.$comment: Covers the full static + unit tier (run-tier.mjs full): all fast + standard steps plus full-tier check:* guards (check:e2e-user-ids, check:e2e-cjs-globals, check:e2e-panel-collapse, check:fixture-freshness, check:ports, check:port-drift, check:audit, check:bare-pino-http-mock). No Playwright suites. ~35 min.
